query_title: What's the Worst That Could Happen?

recommendations.title: The Out-of-Towners
recommendations.overview: The adventures of married couple Henry and Nancy Clark, vexed by misfortune while in New York City for Henry's job interview.

recommendations.title: D2: The Mighty Ducks

recommendations.title: George of the Jungle
recommendations.overview: Deep in the African jungle, a baby named George, the sole survivor of a plane crash, is raised by gorillas. George grows up to be a buff and lovable klutz who has a rainforest full of animal friends: Tookie, his big-beaked toucan messenger; Ape, a wi

recommendations.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
recommendations.overview: Young hobbit Frodo Baggins, after inheriting a mysterious ring from his uncle Bilbo, must leave his home in order to keep it from falling into the hands of its evil creator. Along the way, a fellowship is formed to protect the ringbearer and make sur

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon
recommendations.overview: A veteran cop and an unstable detective become partners who must put their differences aside in order to bring down a heroin-smuggling ring run by ex-Special Forces.

recommendations.title: Duplex
recommendations.overview: When a young couple buys their dream home, they have no idea what the sweet little old lady upstairs is going to put them through!

recommendations.title: Being There
recommendations.overview: A simple-minded gardener named Chance has spent all his life in the Washington D.C. house of an old man. When the man dies, Chance is put out on the street with no knowledge of the world except what he has learned from television.

recommendations.title: Death to Smoochy
